content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Deployment Workflow to Solve Deployment Issues
content.seo_description: Learn how to build a deployment workflow to overcome deployment blockers. A Beginner-level guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting server configurations. By integrating Antigravity for environment abstraction and Claude Code for automated CI/CD scripting, you transform deployment from a manual bottleneck into a repeatable, single-command process. This workflow ensures your client projects ship reliably, allowing you to focus on high-value features rather than infrastructure debugging.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks crafting a pixel-perfect application, but the moment you try to push to production, the screen goes dark. The server errors are cryptic, the environment variables are mismatched, and your client is waiting. You are not just a coder; you are a builder, and every hour spent wrestling with deployment infrastructure is an hour stolen from your craft.

This isn't a failure of your code—it's a failure of your workflow. By embracing an automated deployment pipeline, you move from being a 'developer in the dark' to a 'shippable architect.' We will use Antigravity to standardize your environment and Claude Code to automate the deployment heavy lifting, ensuring your code hits the server perfectly, every time.

steps.title: Standardize Environment with Antigravity
steps.description: Create a unified environment configuration that eliminates the 'works on my machine' syndrome.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a standardized docker-compose.yml and .env.example file for a Node.js/Next.js application, ensuring all production environment variables are clearly defined and abstracted.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Initialize project environment using Antigravity best practices'

steps.title: Automate Deployment Scripting
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write a deployment script that handles build, test, and push operations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust deploy.sh script that runs build checks, executes unit tests, and triggers a deployment to a remote VPS via SSH.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create automated deploy.sh script for production deployment'

steps.title: Implement Health Checks
steps.description: Ensure your app is actually running before marking the deployment as successful.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a health-check utility that pings the root endpoint and verifies database connectivity before finalizing the deployment status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add health check logic to the deployment pipeline'

steps.title: Integrate Error Notification
steps.description: Get instant feedback via Slack or email if a deployment fails during the process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a webhook integration script that sends a notification to a specific endpoint upon deployment failure or success.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add webhook error notifications to deploy.sh'

steps.title: Finalize Pipeline Execution
steps.description: Run the full suite to verify the workflow is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the entire deployment directory and ensure all permissions are set correctly for a secure production environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Execute full deployment dry-run and verify pipeline integrity'

pro_tips: Always use a 'blue-green' deployment strategy to ensure zero downtime for your client's live users.
Store secrets in a dedicated vault service like Doppler; never commit .env files to your repository.
Implement a 'rollback' command in your deploy.sh that reverts the symlink to the previous stable build instantly.
Use 'pre-flight' checks to ensure your production database migrations are compatible before the actual code push.
Keep your build artifacts outside the main project directory to avoid bloating your git history.
content.next_steps: Once your pipeline is live, start documenting your deployment process in a README.md file so you can replicate this success across all your future freelance projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting infrastructure hold your creativity hostage. Master the deployment workflow and start delivering results that make your clients double their retainers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
